commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an ENOTSUP-only fallback from hard-link lock publishing to exclusive write for the session usage-cost cache lock.

PR surface: Source +11. Total +11 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main calls fs.promises.link during usage-cost cache lock acquisition and rethrows non-EEXIST errors, so an ENOTSUP rejection escapes. I did not establish a live SMB/NFS/virtiofs reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real-environment proof, not a safe automated code repair.

target.title: fix(infra): fall back to exclusive create when hard links are unsupported
